programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: The lives of a beautiful young family in Long Beach, New York, rip apart when five-year-old Audrey witnesses her mother, Diane, brutally stabbed to death. To Audreys horror, her mothers murderer is somebody very close to home.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Rogelio Morales is a handsome Marine who sweeps Margarita Sanchez Lemus off her feet. Their whirlwind romance leads to marriage and the birth of a beautiful son. Behind Rogelios winning smile lurks a monster who will soon show his true colours.

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: George Kalomeris is a family man with a good reputation. However, after a dying man accuses him as the gunman, police discover a monster underneath the kind facade - and that he is not acting alone.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In 1980, a teen goes for a run around her hometown in Maine, days later, her savagely beaten body is found. Police re-examine the case when her mum intervenes.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: When Jeff Silvernail returns home to find his partner, Lori, dead in a pool of blood, it appears to be a burglary gone horribly wrong. Investigators must uncover whether Jeff is a heartbroken partner or a monster who couldnt cope with rejection.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Christy Blankenship is stolen from her family on what should be a joyous day, when police find her dead at home, with a gunshot wound to her head. Her husband insists its a terrible accident. But only that morning he had vowed til death do us part.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In 1969, racial tensions escalated into riots in York, Pennsylvania. Two people were killed - a white police officer and an African-American mum.

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Lyle and Carol Kopenskey marry after graduation. But after 40 years of marriage, an old friend returns and jealousies turn to murder.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: 40-year-old Priscilla Strole seeks a fresh start when she and her teenage son move to a small town in California, unaware it will lead to her untimely end.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon returned to school and got a lucrative job. But, one of her men ended her life as this new chapter began.

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: Sex therapist Amie Hardwick had the beauty and brains to charm Hollywood, as well as a number of celebrity boyfriends; when one star rises, anothers obsession is never far behind.

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: Johnny Lewis has everything any 28-year-old actor could ever dream of, but not even a hit show or celebrity girlfriend could keep him from falling headfirst into the most terrifying role of his life.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime

Liz and Kelvin turn to their socials to drum up interest in their first farmers market, Marnie makes a decision on what prime cuts she wants to sell from her Lamb Shack, and Milo helps his Dad load up the Jacobs that are heading for the butcher.

Liz and Kelvin turn to their socials to drum up interest in their first farmers market, Marnie makes a decision on what prime cuts she wants to sell from her Lamb Shack, and Milo helps his Dad load up the Jacobs that are heading for the butcher.

With advice on patio-size greenhouses and clever ways to create raised beds - the team come up with a daring design and create a new accessible garden that allows the soon-to-be-100 war hero - to once again indulge in his life-long love of gardening.

programme.desc: In one of the later `Carry On comedies, a local businessman convinces the town council of a seaside resort to stage a beauty contest, persuading them that it will be a marvellous publicity stunt, but the idea meets with fervent opposition from the local Womens Liberation group, led by a fearsome woman councillor.

programme.title: Carry on Again, Doctor
programme.desc: Doctor Nookey stumbles upon a witch doctors weight-reducing potion while working at a mission in the South Seas. Realising the potential of the potion, he returns to England with the aim of making his fortune.

programme.title: Goodnight Mister Tom
programme.desc: World War II tale in which a curmudgeonly widower living in a small village takes in a nine-year-old evacuee from London. The widower soon realises that his young charge has been damaged both mentally and physically at the hands of his strict mother. He sets about undoing the damage, teaching the youngster to read, write and draw, but as his tenth birthday looms, the child is summoned back to the city.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A battle of the sexes which has raged in Broughton since the First World War comes to a head when ageing feminist Mildred Danvers is found dead after returning to her childhood home. As Barnaby investigates, the misogynist vicar Rev Gantis is shot through the head during a humiliating donkey race at the village fair. Is the killer on the side of the men or women - or do tragedies in Broughtons past hold the answer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the body of arrogant local beauty Melissa Townsend is discovered by the pool at her manor house, DCI Barnaby uncovers a seedy world of adultery and deceit within the affluent rural community.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Joey Callahan: The Notorious F.O.D.
programme.desc: Comedian Joey Callahan performs standup.

programme.title: Scott Long: Life In Flyover Country

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr Cats Cafe. Candy show Mr Cat the drawings theyve done of everyone, and he hangs them up for everyone to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a cold day, Daddy Pig suggests they build a den until Mummy Pig has finished work. After a hard days work, the cushion den is a perfect place to watch TV together!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesnt beat their old TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A storm cancels Peppa and her familys adventure plans so they decide to take it inside. Using their imagination, they go sledding, climb a mountain and have a campfire in the attic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro Pony pretends he is a proper cowboy, telling everyone stories in the camp he has set up in the garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig pops round with some seeds for Peppa and George to plant, with Daddy Pig helping out - by acting as a scarecrow.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George meet Kylie Kangaroo and her brother Joey. Peppa shows Kylie how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and hes bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: To celebrate Freddy Foxs birthday, the children go on a trip to a Dinosaur Park. With Grampy Rabbit as their leader, they follow dinosaur footprints to find Freddys birthday treat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story to help them fall asleep. When George wakes up again, Peppa has to make up a bedtime story to get him back to sleep.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have been on a trip to a mountain beauty spot. When Daddy Pig loses the car keys down a drain, Mr Bull offers to find them with his digger.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: A Cake sale is organised to mend the magic school but Queen Thistle is baking and the no-one can eat her cakes.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Rainbows are a pirates best friend, if theyre looking for a pot of gold. Captain Squid is hiding treasure though, so Rainbows are this pirates worst enemy.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: There is a new fox cub leader in The Little Kingdom: Nanny Plum. Whilst trying to earn their adventure badges the fox cubs find themselves stuck at the top of a mountain.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.sub-title: Paddington Makes Pancakes; Paddington Plays Football
programme.desc: Paddington tries to save Pancake Day in the Browns house when Mrs. Bird becomes injured. Jonathan teaches Paddington football, but Paddington kicks the ball into Mr. Currys garden.

programme.title: Gabbys Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Box family welcomes its newest member, Benny Box; when Mama Box needs a nap, Gabby and Pandy teach Baby Box how to babysit her new brother.

programme.title: Blues Clues and You: Extras
programme.desc: Magentas toy spaceship spins out of control, disappearing into the Blueniverse.

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Tuft Owl wants to paint a nice portrait of her father on a canvas.

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Caylee cant find her toy armadillo anywhere in the Ruffles house.

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Grindle is trying to sleep, but his neighbours are being noisy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Risky Race; Pups Save the Runaway Truck
programme.desc: Boomer decides to challenge Roxi to a race. When Boomers monster truck stunt goes wrong, he gets left dangling from a drawbridge while his monster truck goes on without a driver.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George pays a visit to Mr Foxs Shop after his favourite toy, Mr Dinosaur, breaks. With all the additional features, surely Dino Roar is a good replacement?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Pigs Train to the Rescue
programme.desc: Oh dear! Miss Rabbits train has broken down and all her passengers need to get to work. So Grandpa Pig lends Miss Rabbit his little train, Gertrude.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Playgroup is having a pet competition and everyone has brought their pets. Dr Hamster is the judge, but it is so hard to choose the best pet.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Eek! Theres a spider in the house. Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig to get rid of it. Mr Skinny-Legs is set free in the garden, where he can spin all the webs he likes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppas family is staying at Cousin Chloes house. Its been a long day and everyone is tired and sleepy, but baby Alexander keeps everyone awake with his crying.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Pig is really pleased with all the plastic gnomes and wishing well shes got for the garden. Peppa and George love them too, but Grandpa Pig wishes they would all disappear.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Oh no! The childrens favourite teacher, Madame Gazelle, is leaving Playgroup. They are very sad to be losing her, but decide to throw a leaving party to give her a good send-off.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit is to be given the Queens Award for Industry for all the hard work she does, and Peppa and her friends are to accompany her to the palace to meet the Queen.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: When Grandma gives Tim a hat she made herself, Tim is super excited, but unfortunately it keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Join Tim Rex as he tackles kid-shaped problems with dino-sized solutions in space! Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mums bedroom.

programme.sub-title: Nanny Plum and the Wise Old Elf Swap Jobs For One Whole Day

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Leopold, has announced he is paying a visit to The Little Kingdom. Everyone is very excited that they have a VIP coming and prepare to welcome him in style.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Mr Elf has built a new boat to replace the one Big Bad Barry ate. He is nervous when the king commands him to take them on a cruise to a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben and Holly want to play with Gaston the ladybird but he is missing. Nanny Plum uses her magic crystal ball to find him, and discover his daily routine is not what they thought.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.sub-title: Paddington and the Magic Trick; Paddington and Poor Mr. Curry
programme.desc: Mr. Gruber gives Paddington a box of magic tricks, but Paddington cannot master the tricks until he learns to practice, practice, practice. When Mr. Curry becomes ill, Paddington decides to nurse him back to health with his own recipe for onion soup.

programme.title: Gabbys Dollhouse
programme.desc: CatRat takes Gabby and Pandy on a puzzle hunt through the dollhouse, where they solve riddles, play games and find fun suprised along the way.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When a fishing trip goes wrong, leaving Grandpa Pig and Grampy Rabbit stranded on a desert island, Captain Daddy Dog is the only one able to save them. It makes him realise that he misses the sea after all.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After smelling Granny Pigs perfume de lavender, Peppa experiments with the flowers in the garden to create her own special smell.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa loves the school fete. Her favourite things are face painting, the balloons and the bouncy castle.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Goldie the Goldfish is feeling a little lonely, so Peppa takes her to the aquarium. With all the different fish there, surely Peppa can find a new friend for Goldie?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its a beautiful day but Peppa, George and Grandpa Pig are sitting inside watching the motor racing on the television! Granny Pig shoos them all outside to enjoy the sunshine. Inspired by the racing, Grandpa Pig builds George his own racing car.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is left behind when everyone takes Grampy Rabbits little boat to the riverside picnic spot. Will someone remember him and save him some cake?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are busy building a desert island in a sandpit. They are all very proud of it, with its forest, lake, houses and shops. Its going splendidly, until George and Richards dinosaurs turn up.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its night time at Grandpa and Granny Pigs house, and Peppa and George have stayed up late to help hunt for slugs and snails, but what other night animals will they find?

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: Blues Clues and You!
programme.desc: Lola is really missing her hometown in the Philippines, so Josh surprises her by bringing the Philippines to the house; They explore Filipino culture and family traditions.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The elves give the King some chickens from the Elf Farm so that he can have eggs whenever he likes.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.sub-title: Daisy and Poppys Trip to the Museum
programme.desc: The naughty toddlers cause chaos during a trip to the big museum.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Meet fairy princess Holly and her elf best friend Ben.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Pig family are preparing to go on holiday. Peppa and George pack their favourite toys and Granny and Grandpa are left to look after Goldie the Fish.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family arrive in Italy and discover that everyone is talking in a different language! Daddy Pig finds driving on the right a little difficult. Its all so very strange, but they are soon settled, and Peppa rings Granny and Grandpa Pig to check that Goldie the fish is happy too.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are enjoying the first day in their Italian villa. On a trip to the local village, they find pizza to eat, presents to buy and a postcard to send to Goldie the fish.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa has enjoyed her very first holiday abroad, but now its time to go home. Suzy has missed Peppa very much and cant wait to see her. Peppa has missed her friend too and cant wait to see Goldie, her pet fish again.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George enjoys seeing his reflection in the mirror so much that he and Peppa try to find other shiny things to see themselves in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The playgroup is going on an outing to the museum. Everyone is on the bus ready to go, except Pedro Pony - so where is he?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy are bored because they have nothing to do, so Daddy Pig finds them an old box of garden games to play with, but not all the games are easy for little George.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everyone is down at the lake as its a perfect day to go boating. Miss Rabbit has all sorts of boats for hire and Daddy Pig picks one with pedals, but when all the families have a race, he soon wishes he had picked something easier to sail.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.sub-title: Paddington and the Treehouse; Paddington and the Monster Hunt

programme.sub-title: Mr Bull in a China Shop
programme.desc: While enjoying a tea break, Mr Bull accidentally breaks his delicate teapot. He takes the pieces to Miss Rabbit in the hope that she can mend it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Whats that strange creature hovering in the sky? Its Georges dinosaur balloon, but little George is finding it difficult to keep hold of his big balloon. Can anyone stop it from flying off to the moon?

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing pirates, but when they put together a treasure chest and bury it in a marked spot, Pedro soon realises that he needs to follow the trail. Hes lost something.

programme.desc: Peppas playgroup are really enjoying Grampy Rabbits talk about space rockets, until suddenly he loses his voice. Can Doctor Brown Bear get him speaking again?

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Daddy Pig is looking forward to taking Peppa and George to visit a fish pond that he used to visit when he was a piglet. However, a few things have changed since then.

programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep some old photographs from when they were babies. Peppa and Suzy dont remember being that young, but they are pleased to see that they have always been best friends.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Toy restorers Amanda and Julie have their work cut out reviving a sad dog that has been badly burned in a devastating house fire. The toy has been by owner Jodys side throughout her life, and when she saw her house being engulfed by flames, it was one of the first things on her mind. Now totally scorched, Jody would like her beloved toy to be restored so she can pass it on to her young son Noah.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Toy restorers Julie and Amanda welcome a stuffed monkey called Midge into the barn. Owner Charles received the toy primate as a Christmas present in the 1960s, but when he turned 14, his market trader dad put Midge to work on his Barnsley Market stall. To attract shoppers, the monkey hung from the stall whilst an invisible pulley waved his hand.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Today in the Repair Shop, Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Metal expert Dominic Chinea takes on a toy carriage which originally belonged to a young boy born in 1911. Owner Jane inherited it from her father and remembers pulling it along and sitting on it as a child. Most of all, she recalls placing her stuffed toys carefully inside. Dom turns his hand to replacing the battered roof.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus is in Fife to dig through three generations of family clutter. They uncover a rocking horse and a collection of rare Beatrix Potter figurines.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Today in the Repair Shop, Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. First to arrive is a delicately carved set of clay sculptures, for the attention of ceramics expert Kirsten Ramsey. Owner Jackie treasures the figurines, lovingly crafted by her older brother Andrew who tragically died in an accident at the tender age of 18. After over 40 years on display, the unglazed figurines are crumbling and in dire need of repair.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Ceramics expert Kirsten Ramsay is charmed by a series of handmade pottery vegetable patch signs. Emmas father was extremely artistic and spent their childhood making all sorts of remarkable items. He cast and painted these lovely pieces himself and used them to mark out the different sections of his impressive veg patch in their garden. Sadly, he passed away suddenly and after several years of harsh weather, the signs are cracked, faded and wont stand the test of time.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First at the barn is Andy Crook from Cornwall. His hopes for restoring a very special inheritance rests on musical instrument expert Pete Woods. The rather tarnished tuba belonged to his late father, Frank. Both he and Andy played in various brass bands over the years and shared a real love for performing. Horologist Steve Fletchers skills are really put the test when Kamal from Cheshire arrives with her familys mantel clock.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First through the barn doors is Sue Lock, with her daughter Hannah. They have brought Sues grandmothers leather midwifery bag. They fear the battered old bag is a hopeless case, but Susie Fletcher believes she can nurse it back to life.

programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team restore a whistling wooden statue, a photographers dark-room timer and an owl inkwell.

To attract shoppers, the monkey hung from the stall whilst an invisible pulley waved his hand.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Today in the Repair Shop, Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Owner Jane inherited it from her father and remembers pulling it along and sitting on it as a child. Most of all, she recalls placing her stuffed toys carefully inside. Dom turns his hand to replacing the battered roof.

These forests and rivers, together with heathlands and moors, are home to a diverse fauna. Martens, badgers, wild boars, hares, roe deer, and red deer, even black grouse and hazel deer find shelter in these parts. Wolves also have a dominant presence, not to mention those who live underground, such as lizards, bats, and snakes.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: In Knaresborough, Angus sorts through a massive collection of model aircrafts and incredible paintings. Later, Angus auctions off some iconic toys.

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: In their most horrifying investigation yet, Ian performs exorcism to save a family in Essex. Knowing it will take everything to save them, Jayne makes a desperate plea for help from the spirits of witches she believes used to inhabit the area.

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: The team are called in by Alison, whose 18th century farmhouse is haunted by a young child and another sinister entity who they think caused their pets to become seriously ill. After investigating, a heart wrenching revelation affects the team.

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: Since age three, Noah has experienced creepy visions of a man hiding behind his bedroom curtains. Whilst growing up, the figure seemed like a protective spirit watching over him, but things have changed.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Cywion Bach

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6
programme.desc: Since Dom and Brians heist in Rio they must live as fugitives. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers. Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian OConner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owens older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8
programme.desc: The globetrotting crew faces an unexpected challenge when a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. Now, they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a gang of LA street racers while investigating a rash of truck robberies.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto is forced to come out of hiding when a loved one is brutally murdered. Heading to LA to track down the culprit, he crosses paths with Brian OConnor, the FBI agent whose undercover infiltration of Torettos gang led to the motorised miscreants exile across the border. The two men temporarily put their differences aside as they investigate the killing.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5

programme.title: Dragon Rider

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse

programme.desc: Op and Ed accidentally time-travel from the Galapagos Islands in 1835 to present-day Shanghai. They make their way through the city in confusion and make the horrifying discovery that the species to which they belong became extinct shortly after.

programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: A fast-talking fish gains fame after taking credit for the accidental death of a shark mobster. While enjoying the popularity at first, his tall tale starts to unravel as others begin to suspect that he is not the Defender of the Reef after all, and when the sharks enemies get involved, his lies lead him into dangerous waters. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A life-saving surgery fuses together a police officer and his faithful police dog -- and Dog Man is born. Learning to embrace his new identity, Dog Man must stop feline supervillain Petey the Cat from cloning himself and going on a crime spree.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary LEGO figurine, thought to be the key to saving the world, is accompanied by a fellowship of strangers embarking on a quest to vanquish a tyrant bent on a terrible deed.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Daddys Home 2
programme.desc: Brad and Dustys respective fathers show up to turn Christmastime upside down.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Weaving in and out of the love lives of eight loosely inter-related couples. The bachelor Prime Minister falls for his personal assistant, his brother-in-law is flirting with one of his colleagues, a writer heads off to France and pursues an affair with a maid, and an 11-year-old boy asks his father for advice on matters of the heart.

programme.title: The Ballad of Wallis Island
programme.desc: Old tensions resurface when former bandmates who were former lovers reunite for a private show at the island home of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: The First Wives Club

Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: The story of Blue, a young man of Jamaican descent living in Brixton in 1980, as he hangs out with his friends, fronts a dub sound system, loses his job, struggles with family problems and has his friendships tested by racism.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A US Marine observes the effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow Marines from their brutal basic training to the bloody street fighting in Hue, Vietnam.

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood
programme.desc: John Singletons portrait of black youths struggling to survive the poverty and violence of urban Los Angeles. It follows three youths as they confront the reality of life in South Central.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Funny Girl
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Fanny Brice, who rose from obscurity to become one of Americas most beloved entertainers.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Roxy Hart is sent to prison for shooting her lying lover. In prison she meets tabloid darling and headline singer, Velma Kelly, who is also in for a double murder. With the help of a slick Chicago lawyer, she learns to play the media game and vies for the valuable press attention that will get her out of jail.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A US Marine observes the effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow Marines from their brutal basic training to the bloody street fighting in Hue, Vietnam.

His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: A famed aesthetician faces a new challenge when a rival opens a skin care boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of whos trying to destroy her life.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: A famed aesthetician faces a new challenge when a rival opens a skin care boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of whos trying to destroy her life.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog and Superman are inseparable best friends, now Krypto must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunts 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucys big celebration.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo
programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. The attraction appears to lure its young visitors in very strange ways and it is up to Scooby, Shaggy and the gang to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The crime-busting gang, Mystery Inc, and their dopey mutt Scooby-Doo are back, this time investigating the spooky goings-on brought about by an evil genius intent on wreaking havoc in the town of Coolsville.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Grown-up Peter Pan has to return to Neverland to rediscover his true identity in order to rescue his children from the clutches of the evil Captain Hook. Peter has grown up into a workaholic executive but takes time off for a holiday in London. Once there, his children are kidnapped by Hook, and Peter must throw off his corporate image and go back to Neverland to save his children.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A new kid at a school makes the mistake of dating the ex-girlfriend of the school bully, whose gang then make his life a misery. He then bumps into a handyman who also happens to be a karate master. The handyman teaches him martial arts and he eventually meets up with his tormentors at a tournament, but will they fight fair?

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A new kid at a school makes the mistake of dating the ex-girlfriend of the school bully, whose gang then make his life a misery. He then bumps into a handyman who also happens to be a karate master. The handyman teaches him martial arts and he eventually meets up with his tormentors at a tournament, but will they fight fair?

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A disturbed undercover cop recovering from his wifes death is teamed up with a detective with a stable family background to crack an underground drug ring. The line between duty and off-duty begins to blur, however, when the daughter of one of the cops is kidnapped by the gun-toting heavies.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Psychotic LA cop Martin Riggs and his long-suffering partner Roger Murtaugh are assigned to guard an embezzling accountant due to testify before a federal commission. At first, they think it a routine piece of work, but they soon discover that their charge has been laundering money for the same South African narcotics syndicate they have been trying to crack.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3
programme.desc: Murtaugh is only days away from retirement when he and Riggs, along with officer Lorna Cole, are assigned to track down a crooked ex-cop who is supplying huge consignments of guns to gangs.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Detective Riggs and Murtaugh are called into action to foil a Chinese crime lord who is selling immigrants into slavery on American soil. The pair arent as young as they used to be, and ending up on a Triad hit list doesnt make things easy for them either.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: Eleven years after their horrific experiences at reform school, Tommy Marcano and John Reilly have become two-bit American gangsters, Lorenzo Carcaterra is a reporter and Michael Sullivan an assistant DA. The four are reunited when they chance across one of the abusive guards and take the chance for revenge.

programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. programme.desc: Built by William the Conqueror, the Tower of London is one of Britains most iconic landmarks. Dan Jones reveals some of its fascinating secrets and tells the stories of the traitors, rebels and royalty who met their end inside its imposing walls.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: This programme looks at the conditions in which a commander might choose to fight a defensive battle, with two very different examples. The first is the deliberate German withdrawal to the Hindenburg Line on the Western front in the spring of 1917. The next is the Battle of Kursk, 1943, where the Red Army knew that the Germans were determined to take the offensive again.

programme.desc: As soon as RAF Bomber Command struck back at Nazi Germany, it began to suffer unsustainable losses. This documentary explores the raid with the use of veterans accounts, archive film, and reconstructions.

After being phone buddies for months, Gavin and Stacey arrange a rendezvous in Leicester Square. (Subtitled, Audio Described)

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: After a huge misunderstanding on the phone, Stacey thinks Gavin has finished with her. He drives to Wales to explain and ends up taking her home with him. Having never been further than Bridgend before, her trip to Essex is an eye-opening experience that ends with the biggest surprise of all.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: After his initial angry reaction to Staceys news, Uncle Bryn agrees to drive everyone to Essex to meet the Shipmans. Pam has laid on a cracking spread and the party goes with a bang, but then Gavin and Stacey make an announcement that throws all the bonhomie out the window.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive down to Wales for the wedding fair, and after an eventful trip to church to hear the banns being read, Nessa confides in Stacey her big secret.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Staceys brother Jason arrives home early, much to Uncle Bryns horror. Stacey has her hen night and Gavin has two stag nights, the second of which reveals something about Stacey that could jeopardise the whole wedding.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive down to Wales for the wedding fair, and after an eventful trip to church to hear the banns being read, Nessa confides in Stacey her big secret.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: aul and Bob return to Scotland to fish for salmon once more, this time on the mighty River Tweed. They start their search for a so-called bar of silver surrounded by banks of lush tall trees at the Bemersyde Estate, a place where it is easy to forget the outside world and do nothing but concentrate on fishing.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul takes Bob on a trip down memory lane and back to the River Lea in Hertfordshire, where Paul used to come as a teenager with his mates. They would catch the train from north London to fish this network of rivers and canals that flow from Hertfordshire into the Thames, and just like when Paul was young, Paul and Bob fish for perch.

programme.title: Rick Steins Road To Mexico
programme.desc: Rick starts his journey in San Francisco and enjoys legendary dishes like Hangtown Fry (oyster pancake). San Francisco is also the home of sourdough and where Americas love affair with seasonal cooking took hold.

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein continues down the Californian coastline immortalised by Steinbeck, through L.A. and south to San Diego where a local fishmonger cooks him the best fish chilli hes ever had.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack and David Mitchell return for an episode of previously unseen material from the hit comedy panel show. Over the course of the show, a stellar cast of celebrity guests reveal amazing stories about themselves. But are they telling the truth, or are they making it all up?

programme.desc: Lucille is on duty when Valeries family friend Marjory goes into labour. The team must rally to protect their newest recruit and restore Lucilles confidence in their community.

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James reveals the cars that turned post-war Germany and Japan into motoring powerhouses at the expense of Britain and the US. On his travels he encounters classic E-Types, Mustangs and the German and Japanese upstarts. He also has an unfortunate encounter with an Austin Allegro - the car that helped destroy the British car industry.

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James goes off-road to tell the story of how the 4x4 conquered the world. From the wartime jeep and the global struggle between Land Rover and Land Cruiser, to the white-knuckle world of rallying and boy racers. James conquers Mount Fuji and races through the sun scorched Mojave Desert to decide which is the ultimate peoples 4x4.

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James explores the wilder shores of motoring to discover what happened to the cars of the future that we were promised. From improbable steam cars and ludicrous jet turbines he reveals how the petrol engine and the power it gave us came to dominate the 20th century. Hell take to the waves in an amphibious car, risk his life at the wheel of a notorious electric scooter and take a hair raising trip in the fastest driverless car on earth.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at why mammals are the most successful creatures on the planet. Here he visits Australia and South America to study the lives of marsupials and then moves on to mammals such as humans, who develop their young in wombs rather than pouches.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: When the giant reptiles disappeared, the mammals seized the chance to conquer new territory. David meets moles that can swim through sand, a shrew that hunts underwater, and the worlds strangest bat in New Zealand.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at some of the biggest predators on Earth whose plant prey is armoured, indigestible and sometimes even poisonous. Among the animals examined are the sloth that lives on nothing but leaves, and the rubble rabbit that makes poisons work to its advantage as preservatives.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at rodents, all of whom possess incisor teeth with chisel-sharp enamel on their front edges. Among the animals observed are the agouti, a terrier-sized rodent that can bite through rock-hard shells, the beaver, which can fell trees with its teeth, and the capybara, a relative of the guinea pig, which is the largest rodent in the world.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at some of the biggest predators on Earth whose plant prey is armoured, indigestible and sometimes even poisonous. Among the animals examined are the sloth that lives on nothing but leaves, and the rubble rabbit that makes poisons work to its advantage as preservatives.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at rodents, all of whom possess incisor teeth with chisel-sharp enamel on their front edges. Among the animals observed are the agouti, a terrier-sized rodent that can bite through rock-hard shells, the beaver, which can fell trees with its teeth, and the capybara, a relative of the guinea pig, which is the largest rodent in the world.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a jungle refuge which conceales a story of royal deceit and deception. Along with nuclear bunkers which were infiltrated by outsiders, and a haunted hospital marked by scandal.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a glamorous beachside resort with strong ties to the Russian mafia, and heading to a windswept base which hides lifesaving technology, and a site in Iowa plagued by its past.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The home of an African dictator and a sporting hero, the stage for civil rights revolution, and the facility that held apartheids greatest critic.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at why mammals are the most successful creatures on the planet. Here he visits Australia and South America to study the lives of marsupials and then moves on to mammals such as humans, who develop their young in wombs rather than pouches.

programme.desc: Terry tries to ingratiate himself with his boss by volunteering Junes services as tea-maker to the cricket team.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy goes for a spin in the Jaguar X type estate, Richard Hammond finds the recipe for the perfect roadster, and theres a look at why the Isle of Harris is the ideal location to road test the latest cabriolets. This weeks Star in a Reasonably Priced Car is explorer Sir Ranulph Fiennes.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tries out BMWs latest lifestyle off-roader - the X3, Richard Hammond tests the new Corvette C6, and James May finds out what fits in the back of a Volvo V50. Special guest on the show is Patrick Kielty.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The power of the new Porsche 911 is put to the test on the track, while the Jaguar S type goes head to head with the Vauxhall Monaro VXR and Chrysler 300C. The public get the chance to help to save a bit of motoring history in Restoration, and the guest in the Reasonably Priced Car is Bill Bailey.

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: With the aid of modern technology, the Linneker dating agency gives Richie the chance to achieve his lifes ambition - to have sex, but will he succeed? If the plot flops, Eddies on hand to take advantage.

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: The tranquil calm of Hammersmith is disturbed when Richie and Eddie capture a burglar and, despite having already called the police, decide to keep his loot for themselves.

programme.title: The Good Life
programme.desc: When Tom, determined to make use of every available resource, builds a generator fuelled by pig dung, Margo and Jerry are not amused.

programme.title: The Good Life
programme.desc: Surbitons back-to-basics couple Tom and Barbara have financial problems, so Tom sets about earning some extra money, but he doesnt want to use it to pay boring old bills.

programme.title: The Good Life
programme.desc: Tom and Barbara receive help from an unexpected quarter when harvest time comes around and Tom sprains his back. Its a treat to see Margo dressed for horticultural action, with Jerry in tow.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: At the start of the New Year, Geraldine is determined to celebrate the 20th anniversary of Live Aid and not to celebrate her own 40th birthday. Nothing goes well - the villagers decide to write to the Prime Minister - and speed-dating was perhaps not the best birthday surprise for Geraldine.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The villagers decide to give up something they love for Lent, and a debate rages over the Dibley bunny - is it real or just a figment of Alices sad imagination?

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The vicar is caught in a dilemma when Davids handsome brother comes to stay, and risks the wrath of the villagers when she gives in to temptation.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice solves the problem of the Christmas show by proposing a promenading Nativity, in which she and Hugo will play Mary and Joseph. However, when her waters break mid-performance, she has to check with Geraldine whether she has actually given birth to the baby Jesus.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Bishop of Mulberry is to officiate at the christening of Alice and Hugos baby. Geraldine and Owen are to be the godparents while Frank and Jim act as god-grandparents. When an amazed David finds that he and Geraldine are well matched, he asks her to marry him.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The committee members agree to erect a statue in the green, but they cannot find a heroic figure from Dibleys past.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Nessa and Daves wedding is fast approaching, and the preparations are in full swing. Stacey breaks some life-changing news to Gavin, while Bryn and Jason finally put their big secret to bed. Smithy takes care of Neil the baby, and wishes Nessa all the best as she makes her way to the church to marry Dave.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Stacey returns to Essex to sort out the situation with Gavin, but things are not looking good. Meanwhile in Barry, an unexpected event throws everyone into a panic.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: When Agness family start making comments about her weight, she decides to go on a diet, and quickly discovers just how difficult it is to overcome her craving for fish and chips. Elsewhere, Cathy brings her new, older man home. He is a psychiatrist, and seems much more interested in Agnes than he does Cathy. Meanwhile, Rory has a professional dilemma when he discovers some illegal drugs at work.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Spartacus, the old family dog, is looking poorly. Reluctantly, the family decide the time has come to put her in a home. However, when the Brown children gather together to decide how to break the sad news to their mother, Agnes gets the wrong end of the stick. Under the impression that her children are planning on putting her in a nursing home, a furious Agnes sets out to persuade her children she is not going senile.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee is horrified when he hears that Lucy is considering marriage to Pavlov, a mechanic from the old Eastern bloc, just so that he can stay in the country. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy is stressed, as she has to make an important speech at a recruitment conference and has nobody to help her write it. Sensing an opportunity to impress her, Lee offers his services, which upsets Tim, who also thinks he is the best man for the job. What started off as a small job soon turns into a competition between Tim and Lee.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: There is bickering aplenty in the Brown household, as Rory and Dino are on the rocks and Agnes and Betty rub each other up the wrong way. With Maria about to give birth, Cathy convinces Agnes to build bridges and invite Marias mother Hillary out for dinner. However, the night comes to an abrupt end when Maria goes into labour. Can the family get Maria to the hospital in time?

programme.title: Bottom: Exposed

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee is horrified when he hears that Lucy is considering marriage to Pavlov, a mechanic from the old Eastern bloc, just so that he can stay in the country. However, he is a lone voice in trying to stop it, because one by one, as Lucys family and friends hear Pavlovs tragic tales of life back home, they are persuaded that he is a perfect match for Lucy.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy is stressed, as she has to make an important speech at a recruitment conference and has nobody to help her write it. Sensing an opportunity to impress her, Lee offers his services, which upsets Tim, who also thinks he is the best man for the job. What started off as a small job soon turns into a competition between Tim and Lee.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: There is bickering aplenty in the Brown household, as Rory and Dino are on the rocks and Agnes and Betty rub each other up the wrong way. With Maria about to give birth, Cathy convinces Agnes to build bridges and invite Marias mother Hillary out for dinner. However, the night comes to an abrupt end when Maria goes into labour. Can the family get Maria to the hospital in time?

programme.desc: Stricken by the humiliation of defeat and the harsh terms of the Treaty of Versailles, Germany looks to one man for a resurgence of hope and dignity - Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: While the full force of the Nazi war machine sweeps across Europe, an uneasy calm settles on Britain as Churchill replaces Chamberlain as prime minister.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Despite having the largest pre-war European army, Frances outdated forces were humiliated by the Germans. Identifying a weakness in the Maginot Line, a defensive border which ran along the north east of France but did not extend to the channel in the west, German air and armour power simply skirted the line in the north and forged south.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon visits Istanbul, the beaches and crystal clear waters of the Aegean Sea, before ending up at the war torn border with Syria. He meets a producer now trying to sell wine in a Muslim country with an increasingly conservative government.

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the Taurus Mountains Simon stays with descendants of the original Turks, nomads known as Yoruks, whose lifestyle is under threat from the amodern world and an increasingly Islamic government.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: The real side of boating with Robbie Cumming. On the last leg of his epic journey across the North of England, Robbie tackles the fast-flowing River Ouse and is forced to make an emergency stop. His destination is Ripon Basin at the outer reaches of our inland waterways.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming begins his 300-mile boating adventure across the north of England and the Midlands. He is forced to make a running repair to his narrowboat, the Naughty Lass, while on the Tinsley lock flight in South Yorkshire, he cruises beneath Conisbroughs magnificent viaduct and must wait for an unusual sliding railway bridge to open on the Stainforth and Keadby Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming tackles the fast-flowing tidal River Trent and is invited to join a night-time illuminated boat parade. However, his journey is hampered by a damaged wall in Worksop and a water shortage on the picturesque Chesterfield Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Autumnal fog and an overheating engine prove to be problems for narrowboater Robbie Cumming as he navigates a Roman waterway and the fast-flowing River Trent. Its a journey of many challenges as he runs aground and breaks down in Nottingham.
